description: HunyuanVideo-1.5 local I2V smoke test for UConn A100. Uses the official 480p I2V step-distilled model plus 720p SR so quality can be checked quickly before heavier runs.
prompt: A cinematic live-action xianxia shot using the supplied first frame as visual reference: a young sword immortal and a celestial fairy stand together on a misty mountain bridge, white and silver robes moving in the mountain wind. The camera slowly pushes in while pale petals drift through cool backlight; their expressions shift from guarded calm to quiet trust. Photorealistic skin, natural hair movement, detailed silk fabric, silver jewelry, distant cliffs, mist, and sword hilt. Stable faces, stable wardrobe, coherent body motion, elegant restrained emotion, high-end Chinese fantasy film cinematography.
negative_prompt: anime, manga, cel shading, 2D drawing, game CG, plastic skin, wax face, distorted hands, extra fingers, deformed face, face drift, identity drift, duplicated people, sudden costume changes, flicker, low detail, blur, overexposed, oversaturated, text, watermark, logo
